research if opencode has hooks that we could use to hook pc into it like we do with claude code

opencode is hookable but requires a different integration shape than Claude Code: inject via `experimental.chat.messages.transform`, capture via `event` hook (`session.idle`), and a JS plugin shim that shells out to the `pc` binary since hooks are JS/TS functions rather than shell commands. Mid-turn awareness deltas degrade to next-turn injection, and the experimental APIs will likely churn.
create this as a gh issue
Created GitHub issue #2 — "Hook pc into opencode via its plugin system" (labeled `enhancement`) capturing the full hook mapping, gotchas, and proposed spike.
